LanguageData.FlightControl.description: Capacity of vehicle for flight. If value reaches 0, the vehicle will be forced to crash land.
LanguageData.FlightControl.label: Flight Control
LanguageData.FlightSpeed.description: Speed of movement on the world map while flying.
LanguageData.FlightSpeed.label: Flight Speed
LanguageData.BodyIntegrity.description: The average of all vehicle parts' health. If the integrity of the vehicle reaches 0, it will disintegrate into a fraction of its build cost.
LanguageData.BodyIntegrity.label: Body Integrity
LanguageData.CargoCapacity.description: Amount of weight this vehicle can carry as cargo.
LanguageData.CargoCapacity.label: Cargo
LanguageData.Mass.description: The physical mass of this vehicle.
LanguageData.Mass.label: Mass
LanguageData.MoveSpeed.description: Speed of movement in cells per second.
LanguageData.MoveSpeed.label: Move Speed
LanguageData.RepairRate.description: The amount of health that is repaired per second.
LanguageData.RepairRate.label: Repair Rate
LanguageData.WorkToSabotage.description: The base amount of work it takes to sabotage a vehicle.
LanguageData.WorkToSabotage.label: Work To Sabotage
